work_mode.description: Whether the role is onsite, hybrid, remote, or not specified

detected_language.description: ISO 639-1 language code of the job offer, e.g. fr, en

company_is_aggregator.description: True when company_name currently holds a known job-board/platform (e.g. Free-Work) rather than the real employer. Used by Step 3 to prompt for the real client.

source_platform.description: Name of the job board/platform that posted the offer when the real employer is different (e.g. 'Free-Work'). Kept for audit trail and duplicate detection after company_name has been rewritten to the real client.
